title: "THE SEVEN WORDS" TO METAMORPHOSIS INTO OUR ARCHANGEL, THE

paragraphs.text: "THE SEVEN WORDS" TO METAMORPHOSIS INTO OUR ARCHANGEL, THE
MANIFESTATION OF THE SONS OF GOD!
THE ABOVE IS THE 7 WORDS TO DO THE FINISHING TOUCH TO ACTIVATE OR TRANSFORM YOU TO BE THE SONS OR DAUGHTERS OF OURS (THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID) AS FOLLOWS:

100% ALLEGIANCE, FOCUS, AND PRECISION IN MY FOREHEAD (3RD EYE) TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, SO THAT THERE IS NO SATAN IN YOUR LIFE AS SATAN WILL BOW DOWN TO OBEY YOU WHEN YOU ARE 100% TO US IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID!!
OBEDIENCE WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED IN MY RIGHT HAND, SO THAT WE WILL ESTABLISH THE FRUITS OF YOUR LABOUR!

100% YIELDEDNESS IN YOUR LEFT HAND TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, TO ACTIVATE THE BLESSED LIFE, A STABLE, EASY JOURNEY WITH MINIMUM TESTS IN YOUR ASCEND TO MOUNT ZION, THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN!

100% FAITH IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID IN MY VERTEBRA, WHICH IS YOUR FIRM FOUNDATION DIVINE GROUND THAT YOU ARE STANDING ON, SO THAT YOU WILL NOT BE SWALLOWED UP BY THE DOUBT SNAKE TO HURL YOU INTO TARTARUS WHERE ALL HELL BREAKS LOSE AND AS A RESULT, OPENED THE DOOR FOR THE DEVIL TO STEAL, KILL AND DESTROY EVERYTHING WE HAVE GIVEN TO YOU AND YOUR LOVED ONES AND THE ENTIRE REALM UNDER YOU!
"THE SEVEN WORDS" TO METAMORPHOSIS INTO OUR ARCHANGEL
WALK IN MERCY IN MY RIGHT LEG, AND MERCY SHALL BE SHOWN TO YOU,
WALK IN THE ULTIMATE TRUTH TAUGHT BY THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID IN MY LEFT LEG, AND THE TRUTH SHALL SET YOU FREE AND YOU SHALL BE FREE INDEED!

BEING ROOTED AND FILLED WITH THE FLUID OF THE `FATHER'S LOVE SO THAT YOU WILL NOT BE EASILY DECEIVED WHEN WE PERMIT TESTINGS IN YOUR LIFE TO TEST YOU, TO OFFEND YOUR MIND IN ORDER TO EXPOSE WHAT IS IN YOUR HEART THROUGHOUT 7 OFFENCES OF ADONAI, SO THAT YOU WILL KNOW YOUR STRONGHOLDS AND REPENT ACCORDING TO HOW WE TAUGHT YOU IN THIS BOOK UNDER THE SECTION OF HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS AND HOW TO BRING FRUITS MEET FOR YOUR REPENTANCE SO THAT THE DEVIL WILL RELEASE YOU AFTER YOU HAVE BOTH REPENTED AND BRING FRUITS MEET FOR YOUR REPENTANCE BEFORE THE BLOOD OF JESUS IS ABLE TO CLEANSE YOU FROM ALL YOUR SINS AND UNRIGHTEOUSNESS.

YOU NEED TO BE CLOTHED WITH THE SKIN OF THE SEVERITY OF THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, FOR YOU` TO BE ABLE TO BE CONFORMED INTO THE IMAGE OF A CHRIST BY PERFECTING IN HOLINESS AND TO BE PERFECT AS YOUR ABBA FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, IS PERFECT. FOR WITHOUT THE SKIN OF THE SEVERITY OF THE FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, YOU WILL NOT BE ABLE TO BE PERFECTED. THIS IS BECAUSE YOU WILL TAKE OUR LOVE FOR GRANTED AND TRAMPLE OUR LOVE UNDER YOUR FEET AND CONTINUE TO SIN IF THERE ARE NO CONSEQUENCES OF SIN. WHEN ONE SINNETH NOT, THE DEVIL TOUCHES NOT!

HENCE OUR DISCIPLINE THROUGH SHEKINAIH IS NECESSARY IF MY CHILDREN ARE TO BE PERFECTED UNTO HOLINESS IN ORDER TO PARTAKE OF OUR DIVINE NATURE, FOR WE DISCIPLINE THOSE WHOM WE LOVE AND ARE CALLED ACCORDING TO OUR PURPOSE!
YOU SHALL KNOW THIS TRUTH, AND THIS TRUTH SHALL SET YOU FREE FROM MISSING THE MARK CALLED SIN, AND YOU SHALL BE FREED INDEED.
FOR THE FULL TRAINING ON OUR ABOVE SEVEN WORDS, WE URGE YOU TO WATCH OUR DIRECT TEACHING FROM HEAVEN IN OUR YOUTUBE CHANNEL LINK BELOW:
THE PIVOTAL OF THE UPHEAVAL TURBULENCE REMEDIES IN THE FOLLOWING SEVEN AREAS
AUGUST 2021 MEETING BEHOLD!
THE PIVOTAL OF THE UPHEAVAL TURBULENCES' REMEDIES IN THE 7 AREAS BELOW:
THE MENTAL PERSPECTIVE, "THE PARADIGM SHIFT"!
THE HEARTFELT EMOTION, "REALIGNMENT"!
THE RECHANNELLING OF YOUR SPIRITUAL ENERGY!
THE BOUNCE BACK EFFECT AND ITS RECOMPOSURE!
THE SETTLING OF ONE'S MISSION/GOAL IN LIFE!
THE SPIRITUAL BATTLE STRATEGY!
THE CONCLUSION OF ALL MATTERS!
LIFE IS MADE UP OF "THE UPS" AND "THE DOWNS".
HOW TO MAXIMISE "THE UPS" AND "THE DOWNS" TO ACHIEVE THE MAXIMUM QUANTITATIVE AND QUALITATIVE REWARDS AND PROMOTIONS IN HEAVEN FOR YOU!
CLICK THE LINK BELOW AND WATCH THE DIRECT TEACHING FROM HEAVEN TO TUNE IN FOR THE ANSWERS!
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlw292JuBc496wdbIIIWYqgAT9VUBmEI& feature=shared
ABSOLUTELY, THE TRINITY
IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
"To enlist in the End Times' Army, one must adhere strictly to The Protocols of Heaven, for only those who are pure and obedient will stand in the final battle."
APPENDIX 3 - BEHOLD MY NAMES | THE TEST PAPERS OF THE ADONAI
